source_boundary: Public support file derived from visible pages and AVOS source truth.

services.name: Small-business workflow help
services.description: Practical AI help that starts with one workflow already causing friction.
best_fit: Owners who can name one real workflow that is slipping.
Teams that want a reviewable process instead of a giant transformation.
Service businesses that want privacy and human review to stay visible.
not_a_fit: Removing human review from sensitive or high-trust decisions.
services.recommended_next_action: Bring one workflow to the contact page.

services.name: Intake and missed-call review
services.description: Review what happens when a call or inquiry comes in, who sees it, how the next step is tracked, and where follow-up needs human review.
best_fit: Businesses losing visibility when calls, messages, or handoffs pile up.
Owners who want a clearer way to see what needs response.
not_a_fit: Systems that pretend every call can be handled the same way.
services.recommended_next_action: Use the missed-calls guide, then ask about one intake workflow.

services.name: Founder-led consult reservation
services.description: A 60-minute appointment with PJ to review one AI workflow, with a $225 reservation deposit handled through Stripe Checkout when the same-origin booking backend and Stripe credentials are configured.

reservation.deposit_policy: Non-refundable reservation deposit, credited once toward service if the visitor becomes a customer.
reservation.confirmation_boundary: The slot is not confirmed until Stripe payment succeeds and the booking backend finalizes the record.

best_fit: Owners who already know the workflow they want to review.
Visitors who want a scheduled founder-led consult instead of starting with general contact.
not_a_fit: Booking or payment without visitor approval.
Direct card collection on the website.
services.recommended_next_action: Use the booking page when ready to reserve a paid consult, or use contact first for a manual handoff.

services.name: Scheduling and follow-up support
services.description: Help make appointment reminders, quote follow-up, recurring service communication, and owner review easier to see.
best_fit: Businesses where follow-up is inconsistent or hard to track.
Teams that want drafts, summaries, or reminders while people keep control.
not_a_fit: Letting AI make commitments without review.
Treating customer trust as a fully automated task.
services.recommended_next_action: Ask about the follow-up point that most often gets delayed.

services.name: Reporting and owner visibility
services.description: Support clearer summaries, handoffs, review points, and owner visibility without hiding how decisions are made.
best_fit: Owners who cannot easily see what happened today.
Teams that need clearer handoffs before adding more tools.
not_a_fit: Removing the owner or team from decisions that need context.
services.recommended_next_action: Name the report or handoff that would make the day easier to review.

services.name: Privacy and control guidance
services.description: Plain-English help deciding what data belongs in a workflow, what should stay manual, and where human review must remain.
best_fit: Visitors who want to slow down and understand privacy before adding AI.
Small businesses and families deciding what not to share.
not_a_fit: Claiming a tool is safe for every situation.
Moving sensitive decisions out of human review.
services.recommended_next_action: Read the privacy page before adding a new workflow.

services.name: Family AI guidance
services.description: Plain-English guidance for household AI setup questions, privacy boundaries, everyday examples, and human judgment.
best_fit: Families asking how to use AI tools more carefully.
Households that want examples for drafting, organizing, summarizing, or planning while people keep decisions.
not_a_fit: Replacing parents, caregivers, teachers, or professionals.
Using AI for every family decision.
Treating AI output as professional advice.
services.recommended_next_action: Ask one family AI question through the contact page.

global_boundaries: The public booking page is the direct reservation path and uses the same-origin booking backend plus Stripe Checkout when deployment credentials are configured.
Declared agent write/payment commands require human approval, Idempotency-Key, duplicate or slot-conflict protection, audit records, and server-side validation.
The website does not collect card details; payment happens on Stripe Checkout.
No service entry removes human judgment or professional review.
Family AI guidance remains plain-English setup and privacy guidance with human judgment in charge.
